title: Advanced Equipment
description: This mod adds advanced versions of vanilla tools and armor.
body:
This mod adds advanced versions of the vanilla tools and armor.

# Features
All advanced versions have double the durability of the vanilla versions. 
### Advanced Swords
Deal +1 Attack Damage

![Advanced Wooden Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b2a60bd167efcdf78feff5bd7a58a264e8231ff.png)
![Advanced Stone Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a01a9e497431c7f97590ef07dbb89ba4f8a61ca5.png)
![Advanced Iron Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fe81f65c885f6dadc178e1e7416b48d165de136.png)
![Advanced Golden Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1548818b9c25ca3e39a03631f3a8c5c8091301.png)
![Advanced Diamond Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e88c8831a43346f7c95947dfdbd5ca3696690f54.png)
![Advanced Netherite Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6804d3d9b2f1729fdd1d029941501d1a4d36e83.png)

### Advanced Tools
Mine blocks faster (and for axes: also deal +1 Attack Damage)

### Advanced Armor
Grants +1 Armor

Full Advanced Netherite Armor grants Fire Resistance (as of 1.1.0)

![Advanced Iron Helmet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6958ceb436646e99d69ec9b8db4c1ccc03ff6a7f.png)

### How to get these Items
You can craft these by replacing the materials with their block variants

![Crafting Advanced Diamond Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/922a9c2ae9fbc75142dbdd94eff892f9702c80c7.png)


# Translations
This mod has currently a translation for the following languages:
- English
- German

# Dependencies
This mod requires the following other mods as dependencies:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

# Support
If you have questions, encounter problems, find bugs or have suggestions you can join my discord server:

[![Fneifnox's Mods Discord Server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d65d0cb3b474c0517d6d0e11b8f77c2276edf08f.png)](https://discord.gg/bszSDCq5ms)
